Name: Service Call - Diagnostic Fee
Description: Flat fee for a residential service call and diagnosis.

Name: Electrical Labor - Hourly
Description: Journeyman electrical labor, billed per hour.

Name: Panel Upgrade - 200A Service
Description: Main panel and service upgrade to 200 amp, labor.

Name: Outlet / Switch Install
Description: Add or replace a receptacle or switch, per device.

Name: Light Fixture Install
Description: Mount and wire a customer-supplied fixture.

Name: Wire & Cable Materials
Description: NM cable and wire billed through to the customer, per foot.

Name: Breakers & Devices
Description: Breakers, receptacles, plates, and fittings, per unit.

Name: Whole-Home Rewire - Labor
Description: Multi-room or whole-home rewire labor, flat per job phase.
